issuesFixed.description: ThemeHeading title was too small (headingSize: 3 = text-header-3, 32px/40px desktop).
issuesFixed.fix: Changed headingSize from 3 to 2 in both FeaturedEvents.php (line 97) and FeaturedEvents.tsx (line 145). headingSize: 2 maps to text-header-2 = 48px mobile / 60px desktop (var(--text-6xl)), the closest match to Figma's 56px target.

issuesFixed.description: Event title h3 had uppercase class applied; Figma shows no uppercase.
issuesFixed.fix: Removed `uppercase` from `<h3 class="text-header-2 uppercase">` in parts/card-tribe_events.php. Now `<h3 class="text-header-2">`.

issuesFixed.description: Date badge was absolutely positioned top-2 right-2 on the inner frame. Figma shows badge as a natural flex child at bottom-right of the inner frame.
issuesFixed.fix: Restructured image half: inner frame is now `relative flex items-end` with `p-2` and `overflow-hidden`. Image is `absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover rounded-lg` (fills behind). Badge is a natural flex child with `relative ml-auto` (no absolute), naturally positioned bottom-right inside the frame padding. Also added `aspect-[4/3] md:aspect-auto md:h-full` to give the inner frame appropriate dimensions on mobile and fill parent height on desktop.

issuesFixed.description: btn-tertiary hover turned text black (hover:text-charcoal) because the section no longer has the `dark` class ancestor.
issuesFixed.fix: Added `group-hover:text-[var(--accent-color)]!` to the btn-tertiary span, matching the pattern used by card-post.php. This overrides the base hover:text-charcoal with the theme's neon-green accent color when the card group is hovered. Removed the now-incorrect `dark:hover:text-white dark:focus:text-white` utilities.

issuesFixed.description: Anchor had fixed height md:h-[349px] extracted from Figma frame dimensions.
issuesFixed.fix: Removed `md:h-[349px]` from the anchor tag. Card height is now content-driven. The image inner frame uses `md:h-full` to fill the available height set by the content half.

issuesFixed.description: Image container had no aspect ratio, causing it to collapse on mobile.
issuesFixed.fix: Added `aspect-[4/3]` to the inner image frame for mobile, with `md:aspect-auto md:h-full` to switch to height-driven sizing on desktop. The image itself uses `absolute inset-0` to fill the frame at all sizes.

validationResults.notes: All 8 lint warnings are pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps issues in Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, and Tabs — none in FeaturedEvents. The sync warning (root wrapper InspectorControls vs section) is expected for this editor-controls-only TSX pattern.

output.screenshotNotes: Screenshot at 1440px confirms: event cards render with dark-pattern backgrounds on both halves, date badge positioned bottom-right inside image frame, event titles in Anton without uppercase, venue names visible below titles, VIEW EVENT button with arrow icon present. ThemeHeading section titles now larger (text-header-2). All 6 active block instances rendering correctly.
